label: Cognition and Mood
prompts: How would I describe my mood overall today?
What measurable thing would I like to accomplish this week?
What are some things I can do to reset or relax?
How would I characterize my sleep over the past week?
What is something I can do for myself this week?
How do I feel when something seems ambiguous or confusing?
What are some beliefs I have at the core of how I make decisions?
What emotions have been most noticeable for me today?
How long do certain moods last?
What emotions feel easiest to acknowledge, and which feel harder?
What expectations do I place on myself when I’m in a particular mood?
What stories do I tell myself about why I feel the way I do?
What stories do I tell about myself?
What signals tell me I might need rest, comfort, or support?
How do I describe myself to others?
Does my description of myself change based on who I am addressing?
Which aspects of myself feel familiar and which feel less explored?
Do I notice a difference between who I am and who I want to be?
What sort of expectations do I place on myself in social situations?
How do I feel when I perceive being misunderstood?
Do I make value judgments about people before meeting them?
What do I notice about how my thoughts influence my emotions and vice versa?
What parts of my internal experience feel connected, and what parts feel separate?
What do I notice about making meaning out of my experiences?
What thoughts feel automatic, and which feel more deliberate?
What parts of my routine feel nourishing and which feel draining?
What words or images come to mind when I think about myself?
How would I describe the parts of my identity that feel stable and those that feel fluid?
If I pause and observe, what ways can I examine a situation or emotion differently?
How can I better show up for myself and prioritize my needs?
How does my physical state affect my emotional state?
How do I conceptualize my environment?
How do I describe myself silently?
How does my mood affect how I read social cues?
What do I notice first when I meet someone new?
What sort of qualitiees does someone I get along with well have?
